titles.text: Simple 1500 Series Vol. 22: The Pro Wrestling
Simple 1500 シリーズ Vol. 22 The プロレス

descriptions.text: Powerful wrestlers drawn in full polygon, engaged in hot blooded battle! Enjoy 2 players in Battle Royal and Death Match. Edit Mode allows you to create your very own wrestler. Easy to play , no complex button system. Champion Road takes you through a 10 stage tournament.
